title: 6D/4N The Best of Seoul Korea Winter Experience 2026
details: Experience the magical Korean winter with visits to Nami Island, Mt. Seorak, Gangwon Ski Resort, Lotte World, Starfield Library, N-Seoul Tower, and more. Includes full-board meals, premium coach transfers, English-speaking local guide, and free travel insurance.

itinerary.day_details: Arrival at Incheon Airport. Meet with local tour guide and transfer to hotel in Incheon for check-in.

itinerary.day_title: Day 2: Incheon – Nami Island – Ski Resort (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Visit Pocheon Santa Village, Nami Island ("Winter Sonata" shooting site), and Ski Resort Tour at Gangwon Ski Resort (ski equipment & suits not included). Transfer to Mt. Seorak for check-in.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/korea_japan/6D/4N The Best of Seoul Korea Winter Experience 2026/Day2_1764741172.png

itinerary.day_details: Explore Mt. Seorak National Park including roundtrip cable car. Visit Lotte World with free pass ticket, then Coex Mall & Starfield Library. Transfer to hotel in Seoul for check-in.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/korea_japan/6D/4N The Best of Seoul Korea Winter Experience 2026/Day3_1764741162.png

itinerary.day_details: Ginseng Outlet, Cosmetic Duty Free, N-Seoul Tower (observatory deck included) with roundtrip cable car, Seongsu Cafe Street (own expense), Cheonggye Stream Light Festival (Dec–Jan) / Seochon Light Festival (Feb–Mar), and Gwanghwamun Square. Return to hotel in Seoul.

Visit Red Pine Shop & Amethyst Factory, Shinsegae Duty Free, Dress on Hanbok touring around Gyeongbok Palace, Dongdaemun & Myeongdong shopping streets. Transfer to Incheon Airport for departure preparations.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/korea_japan/6D/4N The Best of Seoul Korea Winter Experience 2026/Day5_1764741186.png

itinerary.day_details: Flight back to Manila. End of tour.

inclusions: 1 night hotel accommodation in Mt. Seorak
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Ski Resort Tour at Gangwon Ski Resort (equipment & suits NOT included)
exclusions: PH Travel Tax ₱1,620 (pay at the airport)
Tipping for local guide/driver: $5/pax/day (collect in Manila)
extra_details: ₱15,000/pax – initial non-refundable downpayment to guarantee reservation of seats/slots
Full payment required 45 days before travel dates
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances
